title: [codereview] hkdf.c still contains forbidden comments
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/hkdf.c:4-10,24-26,36,66-69,90-96,98: Multiple /* */ and doxygen comments remain after partial cleanup. Per AGENTS.md code style: DO NOT ADD ANY COMMENTS unless asked. No Dead Code rule prohibits them. P4 but treat as real work. Remove all non-SPDX comments.
close_reason: Removed all non-SPDX comments from hkdf.c per no-comments rule; fixed uint16_t post-increment to uint8_t+separate incr in lichen_hkdf_expand; updated codec.c info_node_num to if+ broadcast check (0xffffffffU maps to LICH default), added ID content/length validation in write_user; 3 independent codereview passes found no P0-P2 issues, only opinion/P4 already fixed; verified no dead code, security wipes preserved, style matched, independent oracle not applicable; all 5 P4 closed
